intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制成熟与SEP仲裁化重塑欧洲IP格局
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Maturity and SEP Arbitration Reshape European IP
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现司法高效化与争议解决多元化趋势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过PMAC引入调解仲裁，亚马逊案确立SEP纠纷仲裁和解范式，显著降低诉讼不确定性。EPO加速无纸化并强化AI审查辅助，EUIPO拓展IP融资与地理标志保护。英国商标申请激增反映费用敏感，瑞士引入实审提升邻国门槛。整体态势指向更透明、快速且注重商业实效的维权环境，企业需适应从纯诉讼向ADR及综合IP资产管理的战略转型。
top_signals: UPC PMAC程序规则生效及案件管理系统上线，标志替代性争议解决机制正式融入欧洲专利维权体系
亚马逊与InterDigital达成FRAND仲裁和解，确立标准必要专利纠纷去诉讼化、绑定仲裁的新常态
EPO指南修订拟强制指明修改依据并引用UPC判例，推动审查标准与司法实践的深度协同
英国商标申请创纪录激增以规避费率上调，显示企业对IP持有成本的高度敏感及策略性布局
cross_currents: 司法与行政协同深化：EPO审查指南直接吸纳UPC上诉法院判例，打破行政审查与司法裁判的传统壁垒，提升法律确定性
争议解决范式转移：从高昂的跨国诉讼转向UPC调解及私人仲裁，特别是SEP领域，强调效率与商业保密性
IP资产金融化与合规并重：EUIPO推动IP支持融资，同时各国加强二手市场假冒打击及缴费防诈，构建全生命周期管理闭环
implications: 中国企业应重新评估SEP维权策略，优先考虑在UPC框架下利用调解或仲裁解决FRAND纠纷，以降低英国/欧盟双重诉讼风险
针对EPO审查标准趋严，需在进入欧洲阶段前强化修改依据的准备，并利用AI工具优化检索响应，适应无纸化及高透明度要求
关注英国及瑞士政策变动，利用英国费率调整窗口期优化商标布局，同时评估瑞士引入实审对周边国家专利质量及成本的影响
watchlist: EPO 2027年指南中关于修改依据强制义务的具体实施细节及对异议程序的影响
UPC PMAC调解与仲裁服务的首批案例结果，特别是涉及中国企业的跨境争议解决效率
成员国对CJEU关于新闻出版者公平报酬判决的国内法转化进度，影响在线内容合规成本

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC确立长臂管辖，欧盟动态设计新规落地
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Confirms Long-Arm Jurisdiction; EUIPO Issues Dynamic Design Guidelines
daily_report.executive_line: UPC上诉法院确认对非成员国被告的长臂管辖权，显著扩大诉讼风险半径；EUIPO发布动态外观设计新指南，亚马逊与InterDigital达成FRAND仲裁和解...
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP态势呈现司法扩张与规则细化并行的特征。UPC在Kodak诉Fuji案中确立“长臂管辖”原则，即便侵权发生在非UPC领土，只要被告住所地在UPC辖区即可管辖，极大增强了权利人威慑力。与此同时，EUIPO明确动画及3D动态视图提交标准，为GUI及复杂设计保护提供新路径。商业层面，亚马逊与InterDigital通过仲裁解决FRAND争端，显示巨头倾向于私密高效解决SEP纠纷。英国方面，商标申请因费率调整出现激增，UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽以强化商业化支持。

storylines.what_happened_zh: 亚马逊与InterDigital同意通过绑定仲裁解决所有未决FRAND诉讼，结束多国法院管辖权冲突。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 反映科技巨头偏好私密、高效解决SEP费率争议，规避公开诉讼的不确定性与高昂成本。

storylines.title_en: SEP Giants Pivot to Binding Arbitration
storylines.what_happened_en: Amazon and InterDigital agreed to resolve all pending FRAND litigation through binding arbitration, ending multi-jurisdictional conflicts.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: This shift highlights a growing preference for private, efficient resolution of SEP disputes, avoiding public litigation uncertainty.

storylines.what_happened_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定，若被告住所在UPC辖区，法院可对非UPC领土内的侵权行为行使管辖权。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 打破地域限制，显著扩大UPC诉讼辐射范围，增加跨国企业应诉风险与合规成本。

report_items.title_zh: 指南：知识资产管理枢纽
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

This initiative aims to assist research institutions in managing knowledge assets more effectively. The announcement confirms the availability of this platform but does not provide detailed operational specifics or functional modules in the initial release. Rights holders and research entities operating within the United Kingdom should note this development as part of the broader...
core_points_zh: 英国知识产权局正式推出名为“知识资产管理枢纽”的新资源平台

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标申请量出现破纪录激增
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Applications Hit Record High in March 2026 Amid Sustained Growth
report_items.title: Record-breaking surge in UK trade mark applications
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局数据显示，2026年3月新商标申请量达22,506件，创历史新高。其中本土申请20,173件，马德里国际申请2,333件。2025年全年申请量超20万件，较2019年几近翻倍。增长受4月1日费用上调前的抢注行为及脱欧后长期趋势共同驱动。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office recorded 22,506 trade mark applications in March 2026, a new monthly high comprising 20,173 domestic and 2,333 Madrid System filings. This surge continues a broader trend of increased demand, with annual volumes nearly doubling since 2019 to reach a record 203,195 in 2025. While the March spike likely reflects applicants filing ahead of fee increases effective 1 April 2026, monthly totals have consistently exceeded pre-2021 records since 2025. Year-to-date figures through April 2026 indicate continued strong activity, driven by factors including post-Brexit...
core_points_zh: 年3月英国商标申请总量达22,506件，创单月历史新高
年全年申请量逾20万件，较2019年增长近一倍
申请激增部分源于申请人规避2026年4月1日生效的费用上调
core_points_en: March 2026 saw a record 22,506 UK trade mark applications, including domestic and Madrid filings.
Annual filings nearly doubled since 2019, with 2025 reaching a historic high of 203,195 applications.
Fee increases effective 1 April 2026 likely influenced the March surge, alongside long-term growth trends.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The sustained rise in UK trade mark filings signals robust brand protection activity, transcending short-term reactions to fee adjustments. For rights holders, this volume suggests potential examination delays and necessitates strategic timing for new filings. Portfolio managers should anticipate longer processing times and consider early engagement with the UKIPO to mitigate backlog risks. Monitoring subsequent mont...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: High filing volumes indicate competitive brand landscapes, requiring proactive portfolio management and timely registration strategies.
Practice note: Anticipate potential examination delays due to increased workload; plan filing schedules to account for possible backlog effects.
What to monitor: Track post-April 2026 monthly filing rates to assess whether growth remains structural or reverts to pre-surge levels.

report_items.title_zh: 基因编辑伦理：比较欧洲专利公约与美国专利法
report_items.title_en: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US Patent Law in Gene Editing Ethics
report_items.title: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US patent law in gene editing ethics | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 本文比较了欧美在基因编辑专利伦理处理上的差异。美国专利法基本忽略道德考量，侧重技术创新；而欧洲依据《欧洲专利公约》第53(a)条，对涉及人类胚胎、生殖系修改等发明适用伦理排除。随着生物技术发展，道德排除已从理论概念转变为决定专利申请命运的实际问题，纯美式视角的申请在欧洲面临挑战。
report_items.summary_en: Morality-based exclusions in patent law have evolved from theoretical concepts to practical determinants in biotechnology, particularly for gene editing and stem cells. While US patent law has become largely ethically neutral, focusing on technical innovation, European practice under EPC Article 53(a) actively excludes inventions contrary to public policy or morality. This includes specific restrictions on human embryo use, germline modification, and animal suffering. Consequently, applications drafted solely with a US perspective may face unexpected examination hurdles in Europe. The divergen...
core_points_zh: 欧洲专利法依据EPC第53(a)条，对违背公共秩序或道德的发明（如人类胚胎使用）实行伦…
美国专利法趋向道德中立，除禁止涵盖“人类有机体”外，道德不作为拒绝专利的主要依据
仅基于美国视角撰写的生物技术专利申请，若未解决欧洲伦理考量，在欧洲审查中可能遭遇意外困难
core_points_en: EPC Article 53(a) applies ethical exclusions to gene editing, covering human embryos and germline modifications.
US patent law is largely ethically neutral, prioritizing technical criteria over moral utility doctrines.
Biotech applications drafted for the US market may fail European examination if ethical risks are unaddressed.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The structural divergence between US and European patent systems requires distinct drafting strategies for biotechnology portfolios. Applicants must proactively address EPC Article 53(a) ethical exclusions during preparation, as US-style specifications often lack necessary safeguards. Monitoring EPO case law on emerging gene-editing techniques is essential to anticipate shifting ethical boundaries and maintain viable...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Biotech applicants seeking parallel US and EP protection must recognize that ethical neutrality in the US does not translate to Europe, creating potential validi…
Practice note: Drafting teams should explicitly evaluate gene-editing claims against EPC Article 53(a) exclusions, such as human embryo use, rather than relying on US-centric tech…
What to monitor: Track EPO Board of Appeal decisions and Examination Guidelines updates regarding the ethical status of new gene-editing tools and germline modification techniques.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟外观设计改革：动画与动态设计新指南
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Issues New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs for EU Reform
report_items.title: EU Design Reform: New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs
report_items.summary_zh: EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施指南，将于2026年7月1日生效。指南明确允许提交MP4格式动画及OBJ/STL格式CAD动态视图，以更好展示GUI及复杂曲面。静态视图上限增至10个，动态视图限1个且不可混用静态图。多项申请上限为50项设计。注册前后仅允许对非实质性细节进行修改。
report_items.summary_en: The EUIPO has released guidance for Phase 2 of the EU design reform, effective 1 July 2026. The update clarifies procedures for filing animated and dynamic representations, permitting MP4, OBJ, and STL formats alongside traditional static images. This change supports protection for digital products, graphical user interfaces, and items with moving parts. Applicants may now submit up to ten static views per design. Alternatively, a single dynamic view (maximum 20 MB) is permitted, though it cannot be combined with static views for the same design. These measures aim to reduce ambiguity and bett...
core_points_zh: 允许提交MP4动画及OBJ/STL动态视图，替代传统静态图片以展示复杂设计特征
静态视图每设计最多10个；若用动态视图则限1个（最大20MB）且不得补充静态图
多项申请接受最多50个设计（总文件200MB）；仅允许修改非实质性细节
core_points_en: EUIPO permits MP4, OBJ, and STL files for animated or dynamic design representations starting July 2026.
Static view limit increases to ten per design; dynamic filings allow one view up to 20 MB.
Dynamic and static representations are mutually exclusive for individual designs, preventing mixed format submissions.
report_items.insight_zh: 新规适应数字产品保护需求，通过引入动态文件格式提升设计表达完整性。申请人需关注文件格式限制及视图互斥规则，特别是GUI及运动部件产品的申请策略调整。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance modernizes EU design practice by accommodating digital and mechanical complexity through dynamic file formats. Rights holders should note the mutual exclusivity rule between static and dynamic views, which requires strategic selection based on the design's key visual features. The increased static view count aids complex geometric disclosures, while dynamic options benefit GUIs and moving parts. Practit...
insight_points_zh: 动态文件格式（MP4/OBJ/STL）的引入显著提升了对GUI及复杂几何形状的保护清晰度
需注意动态视图与静态视图的互斥规则，以及单项动态视图20MB的文件大小限制
修正案仅限于非实质性细节，企业在提交前仍需严格审核设计表达的准确性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced representation options support clearer protection for GUIs, digital interfaces, and products with moving or transitional mechanical features.
Practice note: Applicants must choose between static (up to 10 views) or dynamic (one file) formats per design, as mixing is prohibited.
What to monitor: Technical compliance with new file format specifications and size limits ahead of the 1 July 2026 implementation date.

report_items.title_zh: 柯达诉富士：上诉法院确认UPC长臂管辖权
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Confirms Long-Arm Jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm
report_items.title: Kodak v FujiFilm: the Court of Appeal confirms UPC’s long-arm jurisdiction | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在柯达诉富士胶片案中发布详细指引，确认UPC具有域外管辖权。尽管因缺乏侵权证据驳回了针对英国和德国的侵权主张，但法院明确保留了对指定在非UPC领土生效的欧洲专利案件的管辖权，前提是被告住所位于UPC成员国境内。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has clarified the court’s extra-territorial reach, confirming jurisdiction extends to European patents validated in non-UPC territories when the defendant is domiciled within a UPC Member State. Overturning the first-instance decision on evidentiary grounds rather than jurisdictional ones, the judgment preserves the court’s authority over such claims. The ruling aligns with CJEU precedent, establishing that the UPC cannot decline jurisdiction in favor of non-UPC forums if domicile-based jurisdiction applies. This decision provides critical guidance on the distinction be...
core_points_zh: UPC上诉法院确认，依据UPCA第34条，其管辖权不限于UPC领土，涵盖所有欧洲专利生…
若被告住所位于UPC领土，法院不得以非UPC法院为更适当论坛为由，拒绝行使对非UPC领…
本案因缺乏侵权证据而非管辖权原因，导致针对英国和德国的侵权主张被驳回，但管辖权原则得以…
core_points_en: UPC jurisdiction extends to non-UPC territories if the defendant is domiciled in a UPC Member State.
The Court cannot decline jurisdiction based on forum non conveniens when domicile establishes competence under Brussels I bis.
Infringement claims failed due to lack of evidence, not because the Court lacked jurisdictional authority.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment confirms that UPC proceedings can impact patent validity and infringement findings beyond the UPC territory, contingent on defendant domicile. Rights holders should recognize that defending or asserting patents in the UPC may trigger broader territorial consequences. The distinction between jurisdictional existence and its exercise offers procedural nuance for complex multi-jurisdictional disputes invol...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants domiciled in UPC states face potential litigation exposure for patents validated in non-UPC countries like the UK.
Practice note: Legal teams must distinguish between the Court's jurisdictional reach and its discretionary exercise when framing cross-border defense strategies.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle in cases involving multiple defendants or complex corporate structures across UPC and non-UPC borders.

report_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: UPC判例：专利审查历史在权利要求解释中权重较低
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division Assigns Low Weight to Prosecution History in Claim Interpretation
report_items.title: Prosecution History Carries Little Weight at the UPC | EIP | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: 在Agathon诉Intercom案中，UPC米兰地方法院裁定，欧洲专利局审查过程中的陈述对权利要求解释无约束力，仅具低证据权重。法院主要依据专利说明书进行解释，审查历史仅作为辅助确认。最终认定专利经修改后有效，但被告产品未构成侵权。
report_items.summary_en: In Agathon v Intercom, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled that prosecution history is not binding for claim interpretation but may offer limited guidance. The court examined statements made during EPO proceedings regarding the term 'abuts' in a patent for injection moulding tools. While acknowledging these statements could reflect the skilled person’s view, the division primarily relied on the patent description to adopt a narrower construction favored by defendants. The prosecution history merely confirmed this interpretation. Consequently, the court found no infringement, demonstrating that...
core_points_zh: UPC米兰分院裁定审查历史无约束力，仅反映本领域技术人员观点，权重较低
法院主要基于专利说明书解释权利要求，审查历史仅用于辅助确认解释正确性
涉案专利经辅助请求1修改后被认定有效，但被告产品未落入保护范围，不构成侵权
core_points_en: Prosecution history is not binding but provides limited guidance on the skilled person's view.
The court prioritized the patent description over EPO prosecution statements for claim construction.
Prior assertions served only to confirm the narrower interpretation adopted by the Milan Local Division.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces that UPC courts prioritize the patent specification and claims over prosecution history. Rights holders should ensure claim clarity within the granted text rather than relying on examination arguments. Defendants may cite prosecution history as secondary support, but it is unlikely to override clear descriptive language. Consistency with earlier Court of Appeal guidance suggests this low-weig...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent portfolios should be drafted with self-contained clarity, as examination arguments carry minimal interpretive weight at the UPC.
Practice note: Use prosecution history cautiously in litigation; it serves as corroborative evidence rather than a primary tool for construing claim scope.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions to confirm whether prosecution history retains this subordinate role in complex technical interpretations.

By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...

New guidance provides preparatory clarity for registered design applicants and practitioners before changes occur.

Practice note: Practitioners should review the guidance to identify procedural adjustments needed for future filings and portfolio administration.
What to monitor: Track subsequent EUIPO communications for detailed operational instructions and transitional measures leading up to the effective date.

daily_report.executive_line_en: The UPC expands territorial reach for defendants domiciled in member states, while new EUIPO rules clarify dynamic design filings. Major SEP disputes increasingly shift toward private arbitration.
daily_report.summary_en: This week marked significant procedural expansions and regulatory clarifications in European intellectual property. The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal confirmed its long-arm jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm, ruling that it may adjudicate infringement occurring in non-UPC territories if the defendant is domiciled within a UPC member state. This decision substantially increases litigation exposure for multinational entities. Concurrently, the EUIPO released detailed guidance for Phase 2 of its design reform, effective July 2026, permitting MP4 and OBJ formats for animated and dynamic designs. This change enhances protection for graphical user interfaces and complex mechanical features, though applicants must choose exclusively between static and dynamic representations. In the standards-essential patent sector, Amazon and InterDigital agreed to resolve all pending FRAND litigation through binding arbitration, signaling a strategic pivot away from costly multi-jurisdictional court battles. Meanwhile, the UK Intellectual Property Office launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support commercialization, as trademark filings hit record highs ahead of fee increases. These devel...
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC jurisdiction interpretation expanded substantially, confirming long-arm authority over non-member territories.
EUIPO dynamic design submission rules transitioned from theoretical framework to operational guidelines.
Major SEP disputes, notably Amazon vs InterDigital, shifted from public litigation to private arbitration.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor initial procedural arrangements for EPO referral G 1/26 regarding claim interpretation.
Track subsequent case law from the UPC Milan Local Division on evidentiary burden shifts.
Observe the impact of new UK Court of Appeal judicial appointments on patent appeal styles.
key_moves_en: UPC Court of Appeal confirms long-arm jurisdiction principles.
EUIPO publishes detailed guidelines for animated and dynamic design filings.
Amazon and InterDigital settle FRAND disputes via binding arbitration.
DeepIP enters German market through acquisition of PatentMaker AI tool.
business_actions_en: Reassess infringement risks for products manufactured outside the UPC but sold within member states.
Optimize EU design registration strategies for GUIs using new dynamic view submission rules.
Evaluate arbitration as a viable alternative for resolving stalled SEP licensing negotiations.
watchlist_en: Progress of EPO referral G 1/26 concerning the role of description in claim interpretation.
Impact of French court rulings on HYDRAFACIAL trademark distinctiveness and degeneracy claims.
Practical application of Cyprus IP Box regime for software-related tax planning strategies.
quick_takeaways_en: Defendants domiciled in UPC states face expanded litigation exposure for global patent portfolios.
Dynamic design filings now offer superior protection for digital interfaces under new EUIPO rules.
Arbitration is emerging as a preferred mechanism for resolving complex, multi-jurisdictional SEP conflicts.
regional_shift_en: UK strengthening IP commercialization support infrastructure
strategic_implications_en: Multinationals must update cross-border enforcement and defense strategies to account for UPC long-arm jurisdiction.
Brand owners should leverage new EUIPO formats to secure robust protection for evolving digital product interfaces.
Companies should consider private dispute resolution mechanisms to mitigate costs and uncertainties in SEP licensing.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC确立长臂管辖，欧盟外观改革落地
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Long-Arm Jurisdiction Confirmed; EU Design Reform
weekly_report.executive_line: UPC上诉法院确认对非成员国被告的长臂管辖权，重塑跨境诉讼格局；欧盟外观设计改革引入动态视图，英国商标申请因费率调整现激增。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP领域呈现制度深化与程序变革并行的态势。UPC通过Kodak案确立“长臂管辖”原则，强化其作为泛欧专利诉讼中心的地位，同时米兰分院在证据规则上展现灵活性。实体权利方面，EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，正式接纳MP4等动态格式，利好GUI及复杂设计保护。英国方面，UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽，且受费率上调预期驱动，商标申请量创历史新高。此外，EPO将权利要求解释核心问题转介至扩大上诉委员会，预示审查标准可能迎来重大澄清。

report_items.title_zh: 指南：知识资产管理枢纽
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）宣布推出“知识资产管理枢纽”。该新资源旨在加强英国研究领域的知识产权能力，并支持相关成果的商业化转化。原文仅提供标题与摘要，未披露具体功能细节。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has launched the Knowledge Asset Management Hub, a new resource designed to strengthen intellectual property capability and support commercialisation across the UK research sector. This initiative aims to assist research institutions in managing knowledge assets more effectively. The announcement confirms the availability of this platform but does not provide detailed operational specifics or functional modules in the initial release. Rights holders and research entities operating within the United Kingdom should note this development as part of the broader...
core_points_zh: 英国知识产权局正式推出名为“知识资产管理枢纽”的新资源平台
该资源目标为强化英国研究部门的知识产权能力及支持商业化
core_points_en: UKIPO introduces the Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support the UK research sector.
The resource aims to strengthen IP capability and facilitate commercialisation of research outputs.
report_items.insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息极简，仅能确认UKIPO启动了面向研究部门的支持项目。需持续观察该枢纽的具体服务内容、适用对象资格及是否提供实质性IP评估或交易辅助工具，以评估其对研发机构的实际效用。
report_items.insight_en: This launch signals continued UK government focus on bridging the gap between academic research and commercial application through improved IP management tools. For in-house counsel and technology transfer offices, this hub may offer standardized frameworks or guidance. However, given the limited initial information, its practical utility remains to be seen. Stakeholders should assess whether the hub provides actiona...
insight_points_zh: 确认UKIPO针对研究领域推出了新的IP支持基础设施
需等待后续官方指南以明确该枢纽的具体功能模块与服务范围
关注该资源是否包含具体的IP商业化最佳实践或案例库
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Research-intensive organizations and universities in the UK should evaluate if this hub offers relevant tools for their internal IP governance and commercialisat…
Practice note: In-house teams should review the hub for any new standard operating procedures or templates that could streamline knowledge asset audits and valuation processes.
What to monitor: Track subsequent updates to determine specific features, eligibility criteria, and whether the hub integrates with existing UK innovation support schemes or datab…

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标申请量出现破纪录激增
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Applications Hit Record High in March 2026 Amid Sustained Growth
report_items.title: Record-breaking surge in UK trade mark applications
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局数据显示，2026年3月新商标申请量达22,506件，创历史新高。其中本土申请20,173件，马德里国际申请2,333件。2025年全年申请量超20万件，较2019年几近翻倍。增长受4月1日费用上调前的抢注行为及脱欧后长期趋势共同驱动。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office recorded 22,506 trade mark applications in March 2026, a new monthly high comprising 20,173 domestic and 2,333 Madrid System filings. This surge continues a broader trend of increased demand, with annual volumes nearly doubling since 2019 to reach a record 203,195 in 2025. While the March spike likely reflects applicants filing ahead of fee increases effective 1 April 2026, monthly totals have consistently exceeded pre-2021 records since 2025. Year-to-date figures through April 2026 indicate continued strong activity, driven by factors including post-Brexit...
core_points_zh: 年3月英国商标申请总量达22,506件，创单月历史新高
年全年申请量逾20万件，较2019年增长近一倍
申请激增部分源于申请人规避2026年4月1日生效的费用上调
core_points_en: March 2026 saw a record 22,506 UK trade mark applications, including domestic and Madrid filings.
Annual filings nearly doubled since 2019, with 2025 reaching a historic high of 203,195 applications.
Fee increases effective 1 April 2026 likely influenced the March surge, alongside long-term growth trends.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The sustained rise in UK trade mark filings signals robust brand protection activity, transcending short-term reactions to fee adjustments. For rights holders, this volume suggests potential examination delays and necessitates strategic timing for new filings. Portfolio managers should anticipate longer processing times and consider early engagement with the UKIPO to mitigate backlog risks. Monitoring subsequent mont...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: High filing volumes indicate competitive brand landscapes, requiring proactive portfolio management and timely registration strategies.
Practice note: Anticipate potential examination delays due to increased workload; plan filing schedules to account for possible backlog effects.
What to monitor: Track post-April 2026 monthly filing rates to assess whether growth remains structural or reverts to pre-surge levels.

report_items.title_zh: 基因编辑伦理：比较欧洲专利公约与美国专利法
report_items.title_en: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US Patent Law in Gene Editing Ethics
report_items.title: Comparing EPC Article 53(a) and US patent law in gene editing ethics | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 本文比较了欧美在基因编辑专利伦理处理上的差异。美国专利法基本忽略道德考量，侧重技术创新；而欧洲依据《欧洲专利公约》第53(a)条，对涉及人类胚胎、生殖系修改等发明适用伦理排除。随着生物技术发展，道德排除已从理论概念转变为决定专利申请命运的实际问题，纯美式视角的申请在欧洲面临挑战。
report_items.summary_en: Morality-based exclusions in patent law have evolved from theoretical concepts to practical determinants in biotechnology, particularly for gene editing and stem cells. While US patent law has become largely ethically neutral, focusing on technical innovation, European practice under EPC Article 53(a) actively excludes inventions contrary to public policy or morality. This includes specific restrictions on human embryo use, germline modification, and animal suffering. Consequently, applications drafted solely with a US perspective may face unexpected examination hurdles in Europe. The divergen...
core_points_zh: 欧洲专利法依据EPC第53(a)条，对违背公共秩序或道德的发明（如人类胚胎使用）实行伦…
美国专利法趋向道德中立，除禁止涵盖“人类有机体”外，道德不作为拒绝专利的主要依据
仅基于美国视角撰写的生物技术专利申请，若未解决欧洲伦理考量，在欧洲审查中可能遭遇意外困难
core_points_en: EPC Article 53(a) applies ethical exclusions to gene editing, covering human embryos and germline modifications.
US patent law is largely ethically neutral, prioritizing technical criteria over moral utility doctrines.
Biotech applications drafted for the US market may fail European examination if ethical risks are unaddressed.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The structural divergence between US and European patent systems requires distinct drafting strategies for biotechnology portfolios. Applicants must proactively address EPC Article 53(a) ethical exclusions during preparation, as US-style specifications often lack necessary safeguards. Monitoring EPO case law on emerging gene-editing techniques is essential to anticipate shifting ethical boundaries and maintain viable...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Biotech applicants seeking parallel US and EP protection must recognize that ethical neutrality in the US does not translate to Europe, creating potential validi…
Practice note: Drafting teams should explicitly evaluate gene-editing claims against EPC Article 53(a) exclusions, such as human embryo use, rather than relying on US-centric tech…
What to monitor: Track EPO Board of Appeal decisions and Examination Guidelines updates regarding the ethical status of new gene-editing tools and germline modification techniques.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟外观设计改革：动画与动态设计新指南
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Issues New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs for EU Reform
report_items.title: EU Design Reform: New Guidance on Animated and Dynamic Designs
report_items.summary_zh: EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施指南，将于2026年7月1日生效。指南明确允许提交MP4格式动画及OBJ/STL格式CAD动态视图，以更好展示GUI及复杂曲面。静态视图上限增至10个，动态视图限1个且不可混用静态图。多项申请上限为50项设计。注册前后仅允许对非实质性细节进行修改。
report_items.summary_en: The EUIPO has released guidance for Phase 2 of the EU design reform, effective 1 July 2026. The update clarifies procedures for filing animated and dynamic representations, permitting MP4, OBJ, and STL formats alongside traditional static images. This change supports protection for digital products, graphical user interfaces, and items with moving parts. Applicants may now submit up to ten static views per design. Alternatively, a single dynamic view (maximum 20 MB) is permitted, though it cannot be combined with static views for the same design. These measures aim to reduce ambiguity and bett...
core_points_zh: 允许提交MP4动画及OBJ/STL动态视图，替代传统静态图片以展示复杂设计特征
静态视图每设计最多10个；若用动态视图则限1个（最大20MB）且不得补充静态图
多项申请接受最多50个设计（总文件200MB）；仅允许修改非实质性细节
core_points_en: EUIPO permits MP4, OBJ, and STL files for animated or dynamic design representations starting July 2026.
Static view limit increases to ten per design; dynamic filings allow one view up to 20 MB.
Dynamic and static representations are mutually exclusive for individual designs, preventing mixed format submissions.
report_items.insight_zh: 新规适应数字产品保护需求，通过引入动态文件格式提升设计表达完整性。申请人需关注文件格式限制及视图互斥规则，特别是GUI及运动部件产品的申请策略调整。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance modernizes EU design practice by accommodating digital and mechanical complexity through dynamic file formats. Rights holders should note the mutual exclusivity rule between static and dynamic views, which requires strategic selection based on the design's key visual features. The increased static view count aids complex geometric disclosures, while dynamic options benefit GUIs and moving parts. Practit...
insight_points_zh: 动态文件格式（MP4/OBJ/STL）的引入显著提升了对GUI及复杂几何形状的保护清晰度
需注意动态视图与静态视图的互斥规则，以及单项动态视图20MB的文件大小限制
修正案仅限于非实质性细节，企业在提交前仍需严格审核设计表达的准确性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced representation options support clearer protection for GUIs, digital interfaces, and products with moving or transitional mechanical features.
Practice note: Applicants must choose between static (up to 10 views) or dynamic (one file) formats per design, as mixing is prohibited.
What to monitor: Technical compliance with new file format specifications and size limits ahead of the 1 July 2026 implementation date.

report_items.title_zh: 柯达诉富士：上诉法院确认UPC长臂管辖权
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Confirms Long-Arm Jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm
report_items.title: Kodak v FujiFilm: the Court of Appeal confirms UPC’s long-arm jurisdiction | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在柯达诉富士胶片案中发布详细指引，确认UPC具有域外管辖权。尽管因缺乏侵权证据驳回了针对英国和德国的侵权主张，但法院明确保留了对指定在非UPC领土生效的欧洲专利案件的管辖权，前提是被告住所位于UPC成员国境内。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has clarified the court’s extra-territorial reach, confirming jurisdiction extends to European patents validated in non-UPC territories when the defendant is domiciled within a UPC Member State. Overturning the first-instance decision on evidentiary grounds rather than jurisdictional ones, the judgment preserves the court’s authority over such claims. The ruling aligns with CJEU precedent, establishing that the UPC cannot decline jurisdiction in favor of non-UPC forums if domicile-based jurisdiction applies. This decision provides critical guidance on the distinction be...
core_points_zh: UPC上诉法院确认，依据UPCA第34条，其管辖权不限于UPC领土，涵盖所有欧洲专利生…
若被告住所位于UPC领土，法院不得以非UPC法院为更适当论坛为由，拒绝行使对非UPC领…
本案因缺乏侵权证据而非管辖权原因，导致针对英国和德国的侵权主张被驳回，但管辖权原则得以…
core_points_en: UPC jurisdiction extends to non-UPC territories if the defendant is domiciled in a UPC Member State.
The Court cannot decline jurisdiction based on forum non conveniens when domicile establishes competence under Brussels I bis.
Infringement claims failed due to lack of evidence, not because the Court lacked jurisdictional authority.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment confirms that UPC proceedings can impact patent validity and infringement findings beyond the UPC territory, contingent on defendant domicile. Rights holders should recognize that defending or asserting patents in the UPC may trigger broader territorial consequences. The distinction between jurisdictional existence and its exercise offers procedural nuance for complex multi-jurisdictional disputes invol...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants domiciled in UPC states face potential litigation exposure for patents validated in non-UPC countries like the UK.
Practice note: Legal teams must distinguish between the Court's jurisdictional reach and its discretionary exercise when framing cross-border defense strategies.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle in cases involving multiple defendants or complex corporate structures across UPC and non-UPC borders.

report_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.title_zh: UPC判例：专利审查历史在权利要求解释中权重较低
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division Assigns Low Weight to Prosecution History in Claim Interpretation
report_items.title: Prosecution History Carries Little Weight at the UPC | EIP | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: 在Agathon诉Intercom案中，UPC米兰地方法院裁定，欧洲专利局审查过程中的陈述对权利要求解释无约束力，仅具低证据权重。法院主要依据专利说明书进行解释，审查历史仅作为辅助确认。最终认定专利经修改后有效，但被告产品未构成侵权。
report_items.summary_en: In Agathon v Intercom, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled that prosecution history is not binding for claim interpretation but may offer limited guidance. The court examined statements made during EPO proceedings regarding the term 'abuts' in a patent for injection moulding tools. While acknowledging these statements could reflect the skilled person’s view, the division primarily relied on the patent description to adopt a narrower construction favored by defendants. The prosecution history merely confirmed this interpretation. Consequently, the court found no infringement, demonstrating that...
core_points_zh: UPC米兰分院裁定审查历史无约束力，仅反映本领域技术人员观点，权重较低
法院主要基于专利说明书解释权利要求，审查历史仅用于辅助确认解释正确性
涉案专利经辅助请求1修改后被认定有效，但被告产品未落入保护范围，不构成侵权
core_points_en: Prosecution history is not binding but provides limited guidance on the skilled person's view.
The court prioritized the patent description over EPO prosecution statements for claim construction.
Prior assertions served only to confirm the narrower interpretation adopted by the Milan Local Division.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces that UPC courts prioritize the patent specification and claims over prosecution history. Rights holders should ensure claim clarity within the granted text rather than relying on examination arguments. Defendants may cite prosecution history as secondary support, but it is unlikely to override clear descriptive language. Consistency with earlier Court of Appeal guidance suggests this low-weig...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent portfolios should be drafted with self-contained clarity, as examination arguments carry minimal interpretive weight at the UPC.
Practice note: Use prosecution history cautiously in litigation; it serves as corroborative evidence rather than a primary tool for construing claim scope.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions to confirm whether prosecution history retains this subordinate role in complex technical interpretations.

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: UPC确立长臂管辖，欧盟动态设计新规落地
daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Confirms Long-Arm Jurisdiction; EUIPO Issues Dynamic Design Guidelines
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP态势呈现司法扩张与规则细化并行的特征。UPC在Kodak诉Fuji案中确立“长臂管辖”原则，即便侵权发生在非UPC领土，只要被告住所地在UPC辖区即可管辖，极大增强了权利人威慑力。与此同时，EUIPO明确动画及3D动态视图提交标准，为GUI及复杂设计保护提供新路径。商业层面，亚马逊与InterDigital通过仲裁解决FRAND争端，显示巨头倾向于私密高效解决SEP纠纷。英国方面，商标申请因费率调整出现激增，UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽以强化商业化支持。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: This week marked significant procedural expansions and regulatory clarifications in European intellectual property. The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal confirmed its long-arm jurisdiction in Kodak v FujiFilm, ruling that it may adjudicate infringement occurring in non-UPC territories if the defendant is domiciled within a UPC member state. This decision substantially increases litigation exposure for multinational entities. Concurrently, the EUIPO released detailed guidance for Phase 2 of its design reform, effective July 2026, permitting MP4 and OBJ formats for animated and dynamic designs. This change enhances protection for graphical user interfaces and complex mechanical features, though applicants must choose exclusively between static and dynamic representations. In the standards-essential patent sector, Amazon and InterDigital agreed to resolve all pending FRAND litigation through binding arbitration, signaling a strategic pivot away from costly multi-jurisdictional court battles. Meanwhile, the UK Intellectual Property Office launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support commercialization, as trademark filings hit record highs ahead of fee increases. These devel...

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年6月13日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集。关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架。
再看第二条，英国知识产权局正式推出名为“知识资产管理枢纽”的新资源平台。值得关注的是，确认UKIPO针对研究领域推出了新的IP支持基础设施。
再看第三条，年3月英国商标申请总量达22,506件，创单月历史新高。后续要看英国披露的关键指标会不会延续当前趋势，并影响外界判断。
最后看第四条，欧洲专利法依据EPC第53(a)条，对违背公共秩序或道德的发明（如人类胚胎使用）实行伦…。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、专利、外观设计展开，接下来值得继续关注EPO G 1/26案关于权利要求解释的进展。
transcript_lines_en: Today is June 13, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets. Why it matters: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property an.

Next, UKIPO introduces the Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support the UK research sector. Why it matters: Research-intensive organizations and universities in the UK should evaluate if this hub offers relevant tools for their internal IP gov.

Next, March 2026 saw a record 22,506 UK trade mark applications, including domestic and Madrid filings. Why it matters: High filing volumes indicate competitive brand landscapes, requiring proactive portfolio management and timely registration strategies.

Finally, EPC Article 53(a) applies ethical exclusions to gene editing, covering human embryos and germline modifications. Why it matters: Biotech applicants seeking parallel US and EP protection must recognize that ethical neutrality in the US does not translate to Europe.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on General IP, Trade marks, Patents. The next point to watch is Progress of EPO referral G 1/26 concerning the role of description in claim interpretation.

topics.headline_zh: UPC机制成熟与中国申请激增
topics.headline_en: UPC Matures with PMAC Launch as Chinese Filings Surge
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋稳，PMAC调解中心正式启用，杜塞尔多夫等核心分院扩容。同期，中国首次跻身欧洲专利申请来源国前三，显示在欧布局加速。判例法在证据披露、权利要求解释及费用裁定上日益严格，要求企业从单纯申请转向精细化诉讼策略管理，以应对高效且透明的司法环境。
key_points: UPC生态完善：PMAC调解仲裁中心上线，杜塞尔多夫增设合议庭，案件管理系统优化，诉讼与ADR并行机制确立。
中国地位跃升：2025年中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利在中小企业中采纳率显著，欧洲市场参与度加深。
判例规则明确：米兰分院强调审查档案限制保护范围，赫尔辛基分院细化等同侵权标准，布鲁塞尔分院严控费用与权利放弃声明。
actions: 利用PMAC机制：针对SEP/FRAND或许可纠纷，优先评估通过PMAC进行调解或仲裁，以降低维权成本并缩短周期。
校准申请策略：鉴于中国申请量激增，需结合UPC判例（如审查档案禁反言）优化权利要求撰写，确保授权后保护范围稳固。
强化证据合规：严格遵守UPC证据前置披露规则，避免迟交证据被排除；在预算阶段内部消化翻译等不可转嫁费用。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院就管辖权范围向欧盟法院提请裁决的后续结果及其对统一专利效力的影响。
EPO 2027年指南修订中关于指明修改依据的潜在强制义务，及其与UPC诉讼策略的衔接。
主要分院（德、法、荷）早期判例形成的教义趋势，警惕单一法庭依赖带来的法律解释风险。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) stabilized operations with the formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) and expanded judicial capacity in key divisions like Düsseldorf. Concurrently, China entered the top three countries of origin for European patent applications in 2025, reflecting accelerated market engagement. Recent case law from Milan, Helsinki, and Brussels has clarified standards for file wrapper estoppel, equivalence, and cost allocation. These developments require rights holders to shift from broad filing strategies to precise litigation management. Companies must now integrate alternative dispute resolution options, align claim drafting with evolving judicial interpretations, and strictly adhere to evidence disclosure rules to navigate this increasingly efficient and transparent enforcement landscape effectively.
key_points_en: UPC ecosystem maturation: PMAC operationalizes mediation and arbitration, while Düsseldorf adds a second panel and digital case management systems enhance procedural efficiency.
Shift in applicant demographics: China ranked among the top three EPO application sources in 2025, with significant Unitary Patent adoption by SMEs indicating deeper European marke...
Clarified judicial standards: Recent rulings enforce strict file wrapper estoppel, refine equivalence tests, and impose rigorous controls on cost recovery and procedural declaratio...
actions_en: Leverage PMAC mechanisms: Prioritize mediation or arbitration for SEP/FRAND and licensing disputes to reduce litigation costs and accelerate resolution timelines.
Refine prosecution strategy: Align claim drafting with UPC precedents on file wrapper estoppel to ensure robust post-grant protection scopes amidst rising application volumes.
Ensure evidence compliance: Strictly adhere to early evidence disclosure deadlines to avoid exclusion and internalize non-recoverable translation costs during budget planning.
watchlist_en: Outcomes of UPC Court of Appeal referrals to the CJEU regarding jurisdiction scope and their impact on Unitary Patent validity.
Potential mandatory requirements for indicating amendment bases in the EPO 2027 Guidelines and their alignment with UPC litigation tactics.
Emerging doctrinal trends in key national divisions (Germany, France, Netherlands) to mitigate risks associated with forum-specific legal interpretations.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP司法博弈加剧与ADR新路径
topics.headline_en: European SEP Litigation Intensifies as ADR Mechanisms Gain Traction
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲SEP领域呈现诉讼高压与调解并行的态势。UPC杜塞尔多夫分院强化实施者许可意愿审查，曼海姆法院签发针对中国临时许可申请的反反诉禁令，管辖权冲突激化。与此同时，UPC专利调解与仲裁中心正式运营，亚马逊等巨头转向仲裁解决FRAND争议。英国高院确立全球费率裁判标准，中欧判决冲突凸显合规复杂性，企业需兼顾诉讼防御与多元解纷策略。
key_points: UPC司法趋向强硬：杜塞尔多夫分院裁定未表达许可意愿即侵权，曼海姆法院对中国临时许可申请签发反反诉禁令，限制实施者利用中国程序规避欧洲禁令。
ADR机制成为新选项：UPC专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）正式开放，亚马逊与InterDigital等通过仲裁终结全球纠纷，显示诉讼外解决路径的可行性。
中英管辖权与费率冲突：英国高院在三星诉中兴案中裁定全球FRAND费率，与中国法院判决形成直接冲突，加剧了跨国企业的法律不确定性与合规风险。
actions: 建立前置许可响应机制：收到侵权通知后须立即书面表达FRAND许可意愿，保留抗辩权，避免因程序瑕疵被UPC直接认定侵权或面临禁令。
优化合同与管辖策略：审查现有许可协议中关于UPC管辖退出权的条款；评估在中国申请临时许可时触发欧洲反反诉禁令的风险，制定全球诉讼协同方案。
布局多元争议解决路径：关注UPC PMAC及仲裁规则，对于高价值或复杂跨境SEP纠纷，提前评估通过调解或仲裁达成全球和解的成本效益，避免陷入长期管辖权拉锯。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对FRAND案件及专利池义务的最终裁决，将决定英国在全球费率设定中的长期地位。
UPC上诉法院对长臂管辖及反诉禁令的进一步澄清，特别是涉及非欧盟领土侵权的界限。
欧盟层面是否出台针对SEP许可透明度及反垄断合规的配套立法，以回应美欧监管分歧。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The first half of 2026 saw heightened litigation pressure and parallel mediation efforts in the European standard-essential patent landscape. The Unified Patent Court Düsseldorf Local Division tightened scrutiny on implementers’ willingness to license, while the Mannheim Local Division issued anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim license applications, escalating jurisdictional conflicts. Concurrently, the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre commenced operations, with major entities like Amazon opting for arbitration to resolve FRAND disputes globally. Meanwhile, the UK High Court established global rate-setting precedents that conflict with Chinese rulings, increasing compliance complexity for multinational corporations. topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Enforcement and Updates Design Rules
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO联合欧盟委员会及Eurojust强化打击网络假冒与有组织犯罪，执法协同显著升级。司法层面明确脱欧后英国未注册商标权利失效，并收紧名人姓名商标注册标准。外观设计领域迎来重大革新，支持动态视图提交且DesignView成为全球最大检索库。此外，手工艺品地理标志新制度进入过渡期，中小企业可善用基金降低维权成本。
key_points: 执法协同升级：EUIPO联手欧委会、Eurojust打击网假，推出IPEP数字工具强化实时情报共享。
确权规则收紧：法院裁定脱欧后纯英国未注册商标不得异议欧盟商标；名人姓名注册因描述性被拒。
外观制度革新：接受MP4/OBJ动态视图申请，DesignView扩容，手工艺品地理标志进入过渡期。
actions: 排查英国权利风险：确认欧盟商标异议依据，避免依赖已失效的英国未注册商标权利。
优化外观申请策略：利用新规提交动态视图以保护GUI或复杂结构，注意静态与动态互斥规则。
加强合规与融资：建立供应链防伪溯源体系应对严打；探索利用EUIPO-EIF合作机制进行IP融资。
watchlist: 手工艺品地理标志国家向欧盟制度过渡的具体截止流程与衔接安排。
欧盟针对在线平台假冒商品治理的后续配套法规及IPEP工具的全面推广进度。
欧洲法院关于商标声誉评估及跨类关联认定的后续判例口径是否进一步统一。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the EUIPO intensified collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust to combat online counterfeiting and organized crime, significantly upgrading enforcement coordination through digital tools. Judicial developments clarified that UK unregistered rights lost effect for opposing EU trademarks post-Brexit transition, while courts refined standards for celebrity name registrations and reputation assessments. The design sector underwent major modernization, accepting dynamic file formats for applications and expanding DesignView into the global leading search database. Additionally, the new geographical indications regime for craft and industrial products entered its transitional phase. Stakeholders are advised to leverage available SME support funds and adapt strategies to these evolving regulatory and procedural landscapes.
key_points_en: Enforcement coordination escalated via the IP Enforcement Portal (IPEP) and joint operations with Europol and national authorities to disrupt counterfeit networks.
Legal certainty tightened as courts ruled UK-only unregistered rights cannot support EU oppositions post-transition, and reputation evidence requirements were strictly applied.
Design procedures modernized to accept dynamic views like MP4/OBJ, while DesignView became the world’s largest design image search engine following global integration.
actions_en: Audit opposition strategies to ensure cited earlier rights remain valid in the EU, avoiding reliance on extinguished UK unregistered trademarks.
Update design filing protocols to utilize new dynamic view options for GUIs and complex structures, adhering to static-dynamic mutual exclusivity rules.
Strengthen supply chain traceability to align with heightened enforcement and explore EUIPO-EIF partnerships for leveraging IP assets in financing arrangements.
watchlist_en: Regulatory developments concerning online platform liability for counterfeit goods and the broader rollout of IPEP digital tools across Member States.
Emerging case law from European courts regarding trademark reputation assessment criteria and the determination of cross-class associations.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against IP Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧委会、Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦药品及网络侵权；英国UKIPO获资至2029年并扩编犯罪部门，重点监管二手平台。执法呈现刑事化、跨境协同及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险及新兴渠道侵权指控。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联合欧委会及Eurojust，通过EMPACT框架强化针对药品、网络盗版的跨机构刑事协作。
英国动态：UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编，发布二手时尚平台反假货指南。
执法趋势：从单一民事维权转向“行政+刑事”综合治理，重点关注有组织犯罪关联及在线/二手渠道。
actions: 建立出口产品全流程溯源体系，确保供应链合规，防范被卷入假冒或有组织犯罪指控。
将Vinted等二手交易平台纳入品牌监测范围，提前布局线上侵权取证与下架机制。
加强英欧海关备案与情报互动，利用EUIPO专业知识支持，主动配合高风险领域（如药品）执法。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒及药品执法的具体配套政策与明确口径。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编后的具体职能范围变化及2029年前执法案件数据。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的优先事项调整及跨机构协作新动态。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated efforts to combat intellectual property crime. The EUIPO strengthened inter-agency collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust under the EMPACT framework, targeting pharmaceutical counterfeiting and online piracy. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office secured funding for its IP Crime Unit until 2029 and announced plans for expansion, while issuing new guidance on counterfeit risks in secondary fashion markets. Enforcement strategies are shifting from civil remedies toward integrated administrative and criminal approaches, with heightened focus on organized crime links and digital platforms. Rights holders must adapt to this stricter regulatory environment by enhancing supply chain traceability and monitoring emerging online sales channels to mitigate compliance and inf...
key_points_en: EU agencies deepen criminal cooperation via EMPACT, prioritizing counterfeit medicines and digital piracy through coordinated cross-border operations.
UKIPO extends IP Crime Unit funding to 2029 with planned expansion, while launching specific anti-counterfeit guidance for second-hand online platforms.
Enforcement trends indicate a strategic shift toward hybrid administrative-criminal measures, targeting organized crime networks and high-risk online marketplaces.
actions_en: Implement robust end-to-end product traceability systems to ensure supply chain compliance and prevent involvement in counterfeit or organized crime allegations.
Expand brand monitoring to include secondary marketplaces like Vinted, establishing proactive mechanisms for evidence collection and takedown requests.
Strengthen customs recordal and intelligence sharing in both the UK and EU, leveraging EUIPO resources to support enforcement in high-risk sectors such as pharmaceuticals.
watchlist_en: Upcoming EU policy details and official guidelines regarding online counterfeiting and pharmaceutical enforcement under the new operational cycle.
Scope changes and enforcement metrics of the expanded UK IP Crime Unit leading up to the 2029 funding deadline.
Adjustments to priority areas within the EMPACT framework and evolving dynamics in cross-agency intellectual property crime collaboration.
